name: setup-agent-guidance
description: Initialize or refresh durable project agent guidance: detect AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md, install a progressive workflow and PLANS.md, then scan the repository to draft project-specific rules and code_review.md with explicit user confirmation.

interface.longDescription: Install a progressive project workflow, ExecPlan guidance, and optional repository-specific agent rules.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $setup-agent-guidance to initialize project agent guidance.
